summary: GLS tracking URL update, MRW integration, and Triador UI endpoint testing complete. 16/16 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. GLS now uses mygls.gls-spain.es/e/{codexp}/{codplaza_dst} format. MRW integration fully functional in preview mode with mock data.

issues: Console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key' - duplicate keys for envios with same order_id and codbarras

action_items: Fix duplicate key warning in LogisticaPanel.jsx - use unique key combining order_id + transportista + codbarras
critical_code_review_comments: GLS tracking URL correctly uses mygls.gls-spain.es/e/{codexp}/{codplaza_dst} format for new envios
Fallback to legacy URL format works for old envios without codexp/codplaza_dst
MRW integration follows same pattern as GLS with mock client in preview mode
MRW num_envio format: M + 11 digits (total 12 chars)
MRW num_recogida format: R + 11 digits (total 12 chars)
Panel resumen correctly counts GLS + MRW envios and recogidas_pendientes
Triador diagnostico endpoint chains 3 tools: proponer_diagnostico, sugerir_repuestos, recomendar_tecnico
Triador returns success=false with error=sin_averia_descripcion when order has no averia
Triador tecnico section only shows when technicians with matching specialty exist
Email tracking URL in ordenes_routes.py line 3703 uses mygls format when codexp/codplaza available
seed_data_creation: MRW envios and recogidas created during testing (mock preview mode)
context_for_next_testing_agent: MCP_ENV=preview active. GLS and MRW both use mock clients. GLS tracking URL format changed to mygls.gls-spain.es/e/{codexp}/{codplaza_dst}. MRW endpoints: /api/logistica/mrw/crear-envio, /api/logistica/mrw/orden/{id}, /api/logistica/mrw/actualizar-tracking/{num_envio}, /api/logistica/mrw/solicitar-recogida, /api/logistica/config/mrw, /api/logistica/config/mrw/remitente, /api/logistica/config/mrw/verify. Triador endpoint: /api/ordenes/{id}/triador-diagnostico. Panel resumen at /api/logistica/panel/resumen counts both GLS and MRW. Panel envios at /api/logistica/panel/envios supports transportista=GLS|MRW filter.

mocked_apis_list: GLS SOAP preview - generates deterministic codexp/codplaza_dst
MRW SOAP preview - generates M+11 digits num_envio, R+11 digits num_recogida

verified_features.feature: GET /api/logistica/gls/orden/{id} returns mygls URL for new envios
tests: envios with codexp/codplaza_dst have mygls format URL
Returns entorno, franquicia_masked, abonado_masked, usuario_masked, credenciales_set, remitente, stats_mes, ultimo_envio
Returns num_envio starting with M, 12 chars total
Returns envios list with num_envio, estado, tracking_url
Returns envios_activos, entregados_hoy, incidencias_activas, recogidas_pendientes, total_envios_mes
Returns diagnostico with causas_probables, tipo_reparacion_sugerido, confianza_global

verified_features.feature: GLS envio stores codexp and codplaza_dst in BD
tests: Verified envios have codexp and codplaza_dst fields

verified_features.feature: UI: LogisticaPanel shows GLS + MRW envios
tests: Transportista dropdown has GLS and MRW options
Table shows both transportistas with mock badge
Dialog opens with 3 sections (diagnóstico, repuestos, técnico)
